name: EdwBhiMbrCobBaseSplitPLd

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_1 AS ( SELECT A.BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, A.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, A.MBR_ID, A.CONSIS_MBR_ID, A.TRACEABILITY_FLD, A.MBR_DOB, A.MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, A.MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, A.MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, A.MBR_GNDR, A.MBR_CONFITY_CD, A.ACCT, A.GRP_ID, A.SUBGRP_ID, A.COV_BEG_DT, A.COV_END_DT, A.MBR_RELSHP, A.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, A.SUB_ID, A.ENR_ELIG_STTUS, A.MBR_MED_COB_CD, A.MBR_PDX_COB_CD, A.DEDCT_CAT, A.MHCD_ENR_BNF, A.PDX_BNF_IN, A.MHCD_BNF_IN, A.MED_BNF_IN, A.HOSP_BNF_IN, A.BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, A.BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, A.PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, A.PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, A.PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, A.PDX_BNF_TIERS, A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK, A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK, A.PROD_SK, A.PROD_SH_NM, B.BEG_EFF_DT_SK, B.BEG_TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_ENR A JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT B ON A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY = B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AND A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK = B.MBR_EFF_DT_SK AND A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK = B.MBR_TERM_DT_SK WHERE B.BEG_EFF_DT_SK <> 'NULL' ), cte_2 AS ( SELECT cte_1.BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, cte_1.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, cte_1.MBR_ID, cte_1.CONSIS_MBR_ID, cte_1.TRACEABILITY_FLD, cte_1.MBR_DOB, cte_1.MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, cte_1.MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, cte_1.MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, cte_1.MBR_GNDR, cte_1.MBR_CONFITY_CD, cte_1.ACCT, cte_1.GRP_ID, cte_1.SUBGRP_ID, CASE WHEN cte_1.BEG_EFF_DT_SK IS NOT NULL THEN dbo.trim_custom(cte_1.BEG_EFF_DT_SK,'-','A') ELSE cte_1.COV_BEG_DT END AS COV_BEG_DT, CASE WHEN cte_1.BEG_EFF_DT_SK IS NOT NULL THEN dbo.trim_custom(cte_1.BEG_TERM_DT_SK,'-','A') ELSE cte_1.COV_END_DT END AS COV_END_DT, cte_1.MBR_RELSHP, cte_1.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, cte_1.SUB_ID, cte_1.ENR_ELIG_STTUS, CASE WHEN cte_1.BEG_EFF_DT_SK IS NOT NULL THEN 'P' ELSE cte_1.MBR_MED_COB_CD END AS MBR_MED_COB_CD, CASE WHEN cte_1.BEG_EFF_DT_SK IS NOT NULL THEN 'P' ELSE cte_1.MBR_PDX_COB_CD END AS MBR_PDX_COB_CD, cte_1.DEDCT_CAT, cte_1.MHCD_ENR_BNF, cte_1.PDX_BNF_IN, cte_1.MHCD_BNF_IN, cte_1.MED_BNF_IN, cte_1.HOSP_BNF_IN, cte_1.BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, cte_1.BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, cte_1.PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, cte_1.PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, cte_1.PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, cte_1.PDX_BNF_TIERS, cte_1.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, CASE WHEN cte_1.BEG_EFF_DT_SK IS NOT NULL THEN cte_1.BEG_EFF_DT_SK ELSE cte_1.MBR_EFF_DT_SK END AS MBR_EFF_DT_SK, CASE WHEN cte_1.BEG_EFF_DT_SK IS NOT NULL THEN cte_1.BEG_TERM_DT_SK ELSE cte_1.MBR_TERM_DT_SK END AS MBR_TERM_DT_SK, cte_1.PROD_SK, cte_1.PROD_SH_NM FROM cte_1 ) SELECT * FROM cte_2

JOB NAME: EdwBhiMbrCobBaseSplitPLd


DESCRIPTION:  Inner join and load base split table for Cob type cd = COM


CALLED BY:  

HASH FILES:

Annotations:
Inner Join W_BHI_MBR_ENR to W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT to load W_BHI_MBR_ENR_SPLT and Assign 'P' to MBR_MED_COB_CD and MBR_PDX_COB_CD
